content:
Recently, I appeared for a Java Backend Developer interview at Travel Corporation India (TCI is a subsidiary of the Thomas Cook Group)

4 min read
1 hour ago

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

TCI Inerview Java InterviewThe interview focused heavily on practical backend development rather than tricky algorithms. The discussion covered SQL, database design, Java Collections, Spring Boot, Hibernate, and Java 8 Streams.
In this article, I’ve compiled all the questions that were asked along with interview-ready answers.
1. Design a Database Schema with Foreign Key Constraints
Question
Given three entities:

• Organization

• Department

• Employee
Design the schema with appropriate Primary Keys and Foreign Key Constraints.
Relationship:

• One Organization → Many Departments

• One Department → Many Employees
Solution
CREATE TABLE organization (
id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
org_name VARCHAR(50),
address VARCHAR(100)
);
CREATE TABLE department (
id…
